expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run explicitly concludes the focus is not covered: “the benchmark’s specific focus … is not explicitly guaranteed by the Phase 4a contract text or the provided feature evidence alone” and further: “does not contain any explicit donut-chart or chart label-specific coverage guidance, nor any explicit instruction to distinguish: label visibility rules … density behavior … overlap/collision handling …”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md assesses Phase 4a alignment as met: “Phase 4a alignment: Meets (structure and forbidden/required scaffolding are clearly specified).” It cites the phase4a contract requiring “Write a subcategory-only QA draft” and “forbid canonical top-layer grouping” with “atomic action chain” and “observable verification leaves.”
